atlassian_domain.title: Atlassian domain
atlassian_domain.description: Your Atlassian Cloud domain, e.g. yourcompany.atlassian.net

atlassian_user.title: Atlassian account email
atlassian_user.description: Email of the account that owns the API token, e.g. you@company.com

atlassian_token.title: Atlassian API token
atlassian_token.description: API token for authentication. Stored in the OS keychain, not in settings.json. Create one at id.atlassian.com → Security → API tokens.

write_enabled.title: Enable write operations
write_enabled.description: Expose write tools (create / update / delete) for Jira and Confluence. Off by default — only read tools are available. Reload the plugin after changing.
